outcome: Pipeline no longer crashes when tree-sitter is missing; all pre-existing test failures fixed

changes.description: get_parser() now catches ImportError from _create_parser() and caches None for unavailable parsers
Added @needs_tree_sitter skip marker for 12 tests requiring parsed symbols; fixed query() result unpacking (returns GraphNode not tuples)
Fixed 6 pre-existing failures: get_callers->get_callers_with_confidence, remove_nodes_by_file return value, file_count vs FileHash confusion, stemming test updated for CONTAINS-based search
